title: evidence_validation_result.json -- internal cross-document consistency log v0.1
description: Produced by consistency-check. Historical record of what was checked, not something downstream stages read past on their own -- the conflict-ledger gate (_conflict_ledger.json, check_conflicts_clear) is what actually controls progression, see harness-guardrails P6. PoC dev-phase decision: logs every field checked, consistent or not, not just findings -- narrow to findings-only once the harness is past PoC (see known-gaps.md).

topic.description: What was compared. e.g. "accident_date across DOC_001/DOC_002"

values_compared.description: Each source's stated value for this topic, with attribution.

conflict_id.description: The _conflict_ledger.json entry this check raised. Required (non-null) when result is inconsistent; must be null when consistent.
